text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Conny has a buzz-cut and yellow green eyes. He wears the standard Cadet Corps uniform with a pale yellow v-neck underneath.

Personality

Conny is a cadet who is friends with most people due to his funny and friendly personality, but he does have a tendency to be flaky or has easily-interchangeable beliefs. As such, Conny is also quite gullible.
